claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A visibly labelled native meter with validated range semantics and an independently optional threshold-context rail.
semantics: Minimum is below maximum and value, low, high, and optimum stay within range; low cannot exceed high.
The visible formatted value and aria-valuetext are identical and locale-aware.
A meaningful visible label owns the accessible name; role, generic name props, and aria value overrides are rejected at type and runtime boundaries.
Native meter semantics and a thicker visual track remain distinct from task progress.
showThresholdSummary links configured boundaries with aria-describedby; false removes the rail, additional formatter calls, and generated description relationship.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: No semantic information depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
